title: Emergency Order No. 3 of 2011 on Prepaid Subscriber Registration
summary: Enforces Regulation 2 of 2008 on registration of prepaid mobile telecommunications service subscribers.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.ott_digit: Order requiring VIVA compliance with prepaid subscriber registration regulation.
